overview:
## Return Value

A `Promise` object that resolves to a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.RecordsResponse] object if the operation succeeds; otherwise, a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit/CKError] object.

## Discussion

To get the fetched record, use the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.RecordsResponse/records] property in the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.RecordsResponse] class.

Similar to the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Database/saveRecords] method, if you don’t specify a zone ID in the `options` parameter, the records are fetched from the default zone. To fetch records from a specific zone, pass a dictionary with the `zoneID` key set to the name of your zone.

items.description: Fetches records by using a query.
items.name: performQuery

items.description: Creates records batch builder object for modifying multiple records.
items.name: newRecordsBatch

title: fetchRecords
